 Just launched: astronomically delicious newcomers!

Denys, we're sending new deliciousness into the world in 3-2-1...

*рЯЪА The Super Mario Galaxy Movie Meal* рЯ™Р*

A mouthful. No wonder, given what's inside:

* a Filet-O-Fish ¬Ѓ ,
* or 6 Chicken McNuggets ¬Ѓ ,
* or a Big Mac ¬Ѓ ,
* or a McChicken ¬Ѓ ,
* or a Royal Crispy Bacon,
* or a Veggie Deluxe.

Plus a Medium portion of fries, a Medium drink and an *exclusive surprise* : 1 of the *4 collectable Golden Coins** !

More Super Mario goodies?

 *Receive 1 of 4 Golden Coins 1 (randomly chosen) with the purchase of a Super Mario Galaxy Movie Meal, consisting of one of the participating Medium McMenus ¬Ѓ. Choose one of the following options: a Filet-O-Fish ¬Ѓ , or 6 Chicken McNuggets ¬Ѓ , or a Big Mac ¬Ѓ , or a McChicken ¬Ѓ , or a Royal Crispy Bacon, or a Veggie Deluxe. Offer valid from 31/03/2026 to 28/04/2026, or while stocks last, in all participating restaurants in Belgium.
